overview: Homeo Scholar is a premium homoeopathic knowledge platform for students and physicians. It provides a multi-source Materia Medica browser (Boericke, Allen's Keynotes, Lotus), interactive flashcards, quizzes with leaderboards, spaced repetition, a Repertory case diary, and an Organon reader — all with a professional premium UI supporting dark and light themes.
features: Multi-source Materia Medica browser with Boericke, Allen's Keynotes, and Lotus tabs
Persistent Repertory case diary — save and name clinical cases with symptom selections and notes
Premium home screen with refined typography, elevated cards, and subtle gradients
Interactive flashcards (Symptom→Remedy and Multiple Choice formats)
Quizzes with difficulty levels and leaderboards (top 10 per difficulty)
Organon reader with all 291 aphorisms and student commentary
Internet Identity login with persistent study progress and bookmarks
